guests.name: TIP4P
guests.parameter_source: Jorgensen et al., J. Chem. Phys. (1983), with the packaged TIP4P.def geometry metadata.

guests.name: H2
guests.parameter_source: Garcia-Holley et al., ACS Energy Lett. 2018, 3, 748-754.

guests.name: N2
guests.parameter_source: Martin-Calvo et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2011, 13, 11165-11174.

guests.name: Xe
guests.compatibility_note: Registered in the UFF family and also used with DREIDING because DREIDING does not provide Xe parameters.
guests.provenance_note: The GenericMOFs 221 K and 4.100 A values are distinct from the Xe4+4 row derived from cofkit's bundled Open Babel UFF.prm.

guests.name: Kr
guests.compatibility_note: Registered in the UFF family and also used with DREIDING because DREIDING does not provide Kr parameters.
guests.provenance_note: The GenericMOFs 166.4 K and 3.636 A values are distinct from the Kr4+4 row derived from cofkit's bundled Open Babel UFF.prm.
